name: ClawLink
description: Trusted SaaS integrations for OpenClaw agents. Connect Google Docs, Sheets, Calendar, Drive, Twilio, Search Console, and a growing catalog of business apps through one plugin. Not affiliated with OpenClaw.
author: ClawLink (hith3sh) <hithesh@taxxa.ai>

apiKey.label: ClawLink API key
apiKey.help: Paste the bearer token you generated at https://claw-link.dev/dashboard/settings?tab=api. Stored locally in OpenClaw's plugin config; never sent to the assistant.
